attacking_style: Commits early on steep ramps (200m+ to go) with sustained power efforts rather than explosive accelerations, often leading climbs but vulnerable to late kicks in final meters.
team_tactics: Israel Start-Up Nation frequently lacks numerical support to control race finales, forcing Woods into solo efforts. Team unable to provide protective positioning or late-race setups on key climbs.
terrain_preference: Sustained steep climbs (2:35+ efforts at ~520W) where pure watts-per-kilo dominate. Struggles on punchy finales requiring explosive accelerations in final 200m, particularly Mur de Huy's steepest gradient.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing kick on ultra-steep ramps under 200m; poor early-stage positioning costs KOM opportunities; insufficient team support exposes him in close GC battles despite superior individual form.
key_patterns: Leads steep climbs too early, gets passed in final 200m (Fleche 2020, 2023)
Superior climbing form undermined by weak team support in decisive moments (UAE 2021 GC loss)
Struggles with explosive accelerations despite strong sustained power output (multiple Fleche appearances)
Positioning errors cost opportunities beyond physical capabilities (KOM jersey loss Tour 2021)
Performs well in adverse weather contrary to expectations (Vuelta 2020 cold/wet)
form_trajectory: neutral: Most recent 2023 data shows maintained climbing strength but persistent tactical/finishing limitations unchanged since 2020-2021 observations
